mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, email, nickname FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND user_id != #{loginUserId} AND ( LOWER(email) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(nickname) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) ORDER BY nickname
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friends ( requester_id, receiver_id, status, requested_at ) VALUES ( #{requesterId}, #{receiverId}, 'PENDING', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE friends SET requester_id = #{requesterId}, receiver_id = #{receiverId}, status = 'PENDING', requested_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, responded_at = NULL, deleted_at = NULL WHERE friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.friend_id AS requestId, u.user_id AS requesterId, u.email AS requesterEmail, u.nickname AS requesterNickname, f.requested_at AS requestedAt FROM friends f JOIN users u ON f.requester_id = u.user_id WHERE f.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND f.status = 'PENDING' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.requested_at DESC
SELECT friend_id AS friendId, requester_id AS requesterId, receiver_id AS receiverId, status FROM friends WHERE friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.update: UPDATE friends SET status = 'ACCEPTED', responded_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted_at = NULL WHERE friend_id = #{friendId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE friends SET status = 'REJECTED', responded_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE friend_id = #{friendId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT f.friend_id AS friendId, CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{loginUserId} THEN receiver.user_id ELSE requester.user_id END AS userId, CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{loginUserId} THEN receiver.email ELSE requester.email END AS email, CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{loginUserId} THEN receiver.nickname ELSE requester.nickname END AS nickname FROM friends f JOIN users requester ON f.requester_id = requester.user_id JOIN users receiver ON f.receiver_id = receiver.user_id WHERE f.status = 'ACCEPTED' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND ( f.requester_id = #{loginUserId} OR f.receiver_id = #{loginUserId} ) AND requester.status = 'ACTIVE' AND requester.deleted_at IS NULL AND receiver.status = 'ACTIVE' AND receiver.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY nickname
mapper.update: UPDATE friends SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE friend_id = #{friendId} AND status = 'ACCEPTED'
